instruction:
Find the volume of the solid formed by rotating the ellipse $\frac{x^{2}} {a^{2}}+\frac{y^{2}} {b^{2}}=1$ around the line $x=2a$.

Options:
A. $$
V=8 \pi^{2} a b^{2}
$$
B. $$
V=2 \pi a^{2} b
$$
C. $$
V=4 \pi a^{2} b
$$
D. $$
V=12 \pi^{2} a^{3} b
$$
E. $$
V=4 \pi a^{3} b
$$
F. $$
V=4 \pi^{2} a b^{3}
$$
G. $$
V=4 \pi^{2} a b
$$
H. $$
V=6 \pi a b^{2}
$$
I. $$
V=10 \pi a^{2} b
$$
J. $$
V=4 \pi^{2} a^{2} b
$$
